title: Klarna Group issues senior unsecured bond 2019
full_text:
Klarna Bank AB (publ) has issued a 3-year senior unsecured bond in the amount of SEK 1.1 billion

Klarna has issued a senior unsecured bond of SEK 1.1 billion with a floating rate coupon of 3 months Stibor + 1.40 percent and a final maturity in August 2022. This supports Klarna’s continued global growth.Nordea Markets, SEB and Swedbank acted as bookrunners in the transaction.

For more information, please visit <www.klarna.com> or contact press@klarna.com.

About the Klarna Group

At Klarna, we make shopping smoooth, offering products and services to consumers and retailers including payments, social shopping, and personal finances. Founded in Sweden in 2005, Klarna provides over 170,000 merchants have enabled Klarna’s innovative shopping experience, that stretches beyond the actual transaction and also allows consumers to take control over their personal finances. Klarna is the most highly valued fintech in Europe with a valuation of $5.5bn and one of the largest private fintechs globally. Klarna has over 2,500 employees and is active in 17 countries. For more information, visit klarna.com.
